Events

Servant Auction

Members offer their skills and time by hosting themed dinners, teaching crash courses, and more to raise funds for our missionaries around the world. Every dollar goes directly toward those toiling hard for the gospel.

Missions Matters

Every Tuesday and Thursday we send prayer updates for a selected missionary. Join the whole church in praying for those on the front lines. Even if you cannot go, you can pray for those who are.

Night for the Nations

Explore the cultural and spiritual realities affecting nations around the world. Come learn how God sovereignly works throughout the nations and build compassion for souls through an evening immersed in God's Word, a cultural lesson, and prayer.
